Video.summary: Hard Knocks 46 continues to bring you some of the best fights in MMA! This episode features the exhilarating amateur matchup of Jiu Jitsu athlete Colton Boxell vs. Boxer Mac Laursen. This is followed by the very entertaining pro contest between the ever explosive Vyron Phillips taking on BJJ Black Belt Leo Xavier.
Video.grandparentTitle: Fight Vault - HK46 - Episode 3
Video.title: Fight Vault - HK46 - Episode 3

Image.alt: Fight Vault - HK46 - Episode 3
Fight Vault - HK46 - Episode 3
Fight Vault - HK46 - Episode 3

Video.summary: Out of the Cage reveals the private thoughts and emotions of an MMA fighter, the ambition that drives them and how they are affected when encountering defeat or facing triumph. Featuring Zac Chalmers at HK40.
Video.grandparentTitle: Out of the Cage - Zac Chalmers
Video.title: Out of the Cage - Zac Chalmers

Image.alt: Out of the Cage - Zac Chalmers
Out of the Cage - Zac Chalmers
Out of the Cage - Zac Chalmers

Video.summary: Have you ever wondered how Ronda Rousey deals with injuries? Hard Knocks fighter Jess Hopkins comes to Sports Condtioning coach Marie Michalski to learn techniques to strengthen her shoulders and improve the muscles in her legs for kicking.
Video.grandparentTitle: After The Fight - Jess Hopkins
Video.title: After The Fight - Jess Hopkins

Image.alt: After The Fight - Jess Hopkins
After The Fight - Jess Hopkins
After The Fight - Jess Hopkins
